#  Public sector 
  * [ Capabilities ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/public-sector#anc01)
  * [ Insights ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/public-sector#anc02)
  * [ Customer stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/public-sector#anc03)


Across the globe, public sector organizations are working to modernize legacy systems, enhance service delivery, and meet evolving citizen expectations. Fujitsu partners with governments to accelerate digital transformation, harness data effectively, and streamline administrative processes. Together, we help create more connected, collaborative, and future‑ready communities.
## Capabilities
Governments
Fujitsu helps government agencies worldwide modernize operations and deliver more connected, efficient, and citizen‑focused services through secure, data‑driven digital transformation.
Local governments
We support local governments in improving service delivery, simplifying administration, and building more inclusive and resilient communities through technology innovation.
Education
Fujitsu empowers education with advanced digital solutions that expand access to learning, enhance teaching, and enable institutions to evolve for the future.
Defense
We provide secure, advanced digital capabilities that help defense organizations modernize systems, strengthen decision‑making, and maintain operational readiness in a rapidly changing security landscape.
## Insights
**From Smart Cities to Net Positive Results**
Cities face complex challenges like climate change and aging infrastructure. This paper proposes a "Net Positive City" model, leveraging AI and Digital Twins for systemic transformation to build a healthier, more resilient urban future.
[ Learn more about the "Net Positive City" ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight/tl-netpositivecity-20250919)
![Urban landscape of an architectural model. A person holding documents stands in the background.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/insight/tl-netpositivecity-20250919/kv-netpositivecity-936x578.png?h=578&iar=0&w=936&rev=707c8e55c65e4198a91b473cb86d608f&hash=84545A245C219CF249AE7F6FD241569C)
[ Current Status and Future Prospects of Decarbonization Efforts throughout the Supply Chain](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2025-03-27/02/)
![Dr.Noboru Koshizuka\(Professor, Interfaculty Initiative in Information Studies / Director, Institute of Infrastructure Application of Ubiquitous Computing, The University of Tokyo, Chair of Green x Digital Consortium\) and Dr.Tomoko Konishi-Nagano, Senior manager, Global Solution Business Group, Strategy & Transformation Unit, Fujits, who is in charge of the project](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/corporate-blog_global_fujitsu_com_fgb_2025-03-27_02-936x578.jpg?rev=e6dd2e1f1fa04dbfa52b9232afb3ac86&hash=0926897C63733C99E3029C6AF9F03702)
[ Debating the Future: Solving social issues through collaboration](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2025-02-14/01)
![Group photo from the 2nd Fujitsu Small Research Lab Conference.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/corporate-blog_global_fujitsu_com_fgb_2025-02-14_01-936x578.jpg?rev=0a9143335a734d148fb7fde7f1697192&hash=99B0B59D660F419ABF4FC2B2A44003EF)
[ The Regenerative Enterprise: A New Sustainable Enterprise](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2024-09-02/01/)
![Earth from space](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/corporate-blog_global_fujitsu_com_fgb_2024-09-02_01-936x578.jpg?rev=e1e4e84ba9d5430f8d65989520fb2dd8&hash=9AA26D6526DA7C3853C8F17D30EC7E6C)
## Customer stories
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-estonian-unemployment-insurance-fund-20251125/cs-estonian-unemployment-insurance-fund-20251125-809x500.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=1268098a89f54068ba5ab95bdd582bac&hash=165E8F90BA67EA1999FF90814C569088)
[ University of Bristol](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-university-of-bristol-20251113)
The Bristol Digital Futures Institute (BDFI) partnered with Fujitsu to deliver a powerful data centre environment for its Reality Emulator. The secure research environment supports digital twin modelling, VR and collaboration across academia, industry and communities to support innovation.
![A large round black object with a screen on it.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-university-of-bristol-20251113/cs-university-of-bristol-20251113-809x500.jpg?rev=3af2eab0bb22405382a2ba56b55d78cb&hash=80A5DAE00194D4FE1FB4B93C73543117)
[ Saue Municipality](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-saue-municipality-20251105)
To modernize its financial operations and enable automation, Saue Municipality partnered with Fujitsu to implement Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, a scalable, cloud-based ERP solution. For the future, Saue has set a benchmark for digital transformation in the public sector.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-saue-municipality-20251105/cs-saue-municipality-20251105-809x500.png?rev=2b6acbcffbab4a819103d39c0a595592&hash=04D4D50C1C8E4B171479882B06D65DBF)
[ Auckland Transport](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-auckland-transport-20250516)
Fujitsu partnered with Auckland Transport to digitize manual processes using ServiceNow, leading to a 20% cost reduction in processing applications and a more seamless customer experience.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-auckland-transport-20250516/cs-auckland-transport-20250516-809x500.png?rev=9a4b9f617f9d478080a1910b62012735&hash=73474ADB6471AF2C30BBE83D7EDD69C2)
[ Public sector customer stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories?tags=Public%20Sector)
